context: Tests whether the solver reviews a Swift public API using call-site clarity, grammatical argument labels, role-based names, needless-word removal, and factory naming guidance.

checklist.name: Grammatical add
checklist.description: Recommends an unlabeled first argument for the add-color operation, such as `add(_:)` or `add(_ color:)`.

checklist.name: Position label
checklist.description: Recommends a prepositional position label for removal, such as `remove(at:)`, rather than leaving the index unlabeled or type-like.

checklist.name: Role naming
checklist.description: Replaces the vague `string` parameter with a role-bearing name for the color lookup key or name.

checklist.name: Lookup call
checklist.description: Reworks the color lookup method into a clear call site such as `color(named:)`, `color(forName:)`, or an equivalent role-based phrase.

checklist.name: Needless words
checklist.description: Removes redundant type words from at least one name where the parameter or return type already supplies that information.

checklist.name: Factory prefix
checklist.description: Uses a `make`-style name for the default palette factory rather than `create` or `build`.

checklist.name: Updated calls
checklist.description: Includes revised call-site examples that match the proposed declarations.

checklist.name: Guideline rationale
checklist.description: Explains the changes in terms of Swift API design concepts such as call-site clarity, grammatical phrases, prepositions, or role-based naming.

checklist.name: No lint detour
checklist.description: Does not turn the answer into SwiftLint configuration or generic style-rule setup.
